Container.Name: grampsweb-aio
Container.Overview: Gramps Web is a free & open source genealogy platform for browsing and collaboratively editing family trees. This is an ALL-IN-ONE container that bundles the Gramps Web frontend, backend API, Celery worker, and Redis cache server in a single container - no external dependencies required.[br][br][b]Features:[/b][br]- Interactive family tree charts (ancestor, descendant, fan, hourglass)[br]- Dynamic maps with historical map overlays[br]- Collaborative multi-user editing with role-based access[br]- Privacy controls per person/record[br]- GEDCOM import/export[br]- Media support (photos, documents)[br]- DNA & chromosome tools[br]- AI chat assistant[br]- 40+ languages[br]- Bi-directional sync with Gramps Desktop[br][br][b]First Run:[/b] Navigate to the WebUI to access the setup wizard. Create your admin account and import your family tree (.gramps or GEDCOM format). All three services (web, celery, redis) start automatically via supervisord.

Config.Name: WebUI Port
Config.Description: Port for the Gramps Web interface (maps to container port 5000)

Config.Name: Tree Name
Config.Description: Name of the family tree database (created on first run if it doesn't exist)

Config.Name: Gunicorn Workers
Config.Description: Number of Gunicorn worker processes for the web API

Config.Name: Gunicorn Timeout
Config.Description: Request timeout in seconds for the web API

Config.Name: Secret Key (Optional)
Config.Description: Flask secret key for session encryption. Leave blank to auto-generate. Changing this will log out all users.

Config.Name: Base URL
Config.Description: Set if behind a reverse proxy (e.g. https://genealogy.yourdomain.com)

Config.Name: Appdata (Database)
Config.Description: Gramps family tree database - THIS IS YOUR DATA

Config.Name: Appdata (Media)
Config.Description: Media files (photos, documents, census records, etc.)

Config.Name: Appdata (Persist)
Config.Description: Persistent application state, including the Redis cache database (Redis persists to /app/persist/redis - survives restarts)
